CVE-2020-7788.title: This affects the package ini before 1.3.6. If an attacker submits ...
CVE-2020-7788.summary: This affects the package ini before 1.3.6. If an attacker submits a malicious INI file to an application that parses it with ini.parse, they will pollute the prototype on the application. This can be exploited further depending on the context.
